description: Expansion from the v12 benchmark-v2 500K evaluation CSV to roughly 1M train-eligible rows plus the fixed 75K benchmark-v2 held-out rows. The new 500K rows use a broader space-filling mix to improve 12D coverage while preserving hard S3/A3/B2/A1 coupling diagnostics.

space_filling.note: This is not an exact orthogonal design. It is a per-regime Latin-hypercube, physics-guided space-filling expansion. The large coupled_full_random and coupled_sparse_random quotas are intended to improve broad 12D interpolation rather than only local hard-regime performance.

relative_angles.note: Only vector-vector pairs are actively angle-constrained by the generator. Scalar-vector labels are retained for traceability.

c1_balanced.note: C1 is intentionally monitored but not allowed to dominate model selection because current defocus settings limit intrinsic C1 sensitivity.

coverage_metrics_to_track.decision_rule: Do not approve a 2M expansion only because model metrics improve. Require sampling diagnostics to show remaining coverage gaps or benchmark/stress errors that cannot be fixed by architecture/optimizer tuning.

decision_note.purpose: Move from targeted 500K training to a broader 1M train-eligible dataset while preserving fixed benchmark-v2 validation/blind/stress evaluation.
decision_note.resource_note: Use mini-batch training and chunked evaluation/prediction. Back up the generated v13 CSV to Google Drive before training so the 1M simulation is not lost if the runtime disconnects.
decision_note.promotion_rule: Promote only if v13 improves or preserves weighted score, blind/stress normalized MAE, high-S3 vector metrics, B2/A3 vector diagnostics, and sampling-quality coverage without easy-target regression.
